title: SMTP Relay Failure Blocking All Outgoing Email Notifications
symptoms: SES returning 'Daily sending quota exceeded' errors
Email delivery queue growing with no outbound processing
SES dashboard showing 2.1M emails sent (daily quota: 2M)
Marketing batch job log showing incorrect segment filter
All transactional email channels blocked (password reset, 2FA, order confirmation)
root_cause: Marketing batch email job sent to 2.1M addresses instead of 50K target segment due to missing segment filter, exhausting the daily SES sending quota and blocking transactional email
resolution: Requested emergency SES quota increase from AWS, prioritized transactional email queue over marketing, implemented separate SES configurations for transactional vs marketing email
preventive_actions: Implement separate SES accounts for transactional and marketing email
Add segment size validation check before batch email sends
Set sending rate limits on marketing email pipeline
Implement SES quota usage monitoring with alerts at 70% and 90%
Create batch email approval workflow requiring segment verification

timeline.event: Marketing batch email job starts with incorrect segment filter
SES daily sending quota exhausted at 2.1M emails
Operations team notices missing transactional email reports
Priya Sharma investigates, discovers quota exhaustion
Marketing batch job identified as root cause
Quota increased, transactional email queue draining
All transactional emails delivered, incident resolved

embedding_summary: SMTP relay failure after marketing batch email job accidentally sent to 2.1M addresses instead of 50K segment, exhausting SES daily sending quota. All transactional emails blocked for 3 hours including password resets and 2FA. Resolved by emergency quota increase and separating email accounts.
